otherworldorigins.action.cannot_use_whil: You can not use this while casting a spell!
otherworldorigins.restriction.not_attune: You are not attuned to this spell
otherworldorigins.disconnect.validation_: Failed to validate origin layers after multiple attempts. Please try reconnecting. If this happens repeatedly, please check your network connection.
otherworldorigins.gui.enchantment_restri: Only %s can make use of the %s enchantment
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.cantrip:
Cantrips are low-level spells that have a short cooldown and low mana cost. 

They have a separate keybind, bypass class restrictions, and do not use up a spell slot.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.wildshape_fo:
Wildshape forms by character level:

Level 2: Wolf, Cat
Level 4: Snow Leopard, Maned Wolf
Level 6: Dolphin, Gorilla, Anaconda
Level 8: Bald Eagle
To exit Wildshape early, hold %s and %s together for 3 seconds.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.wildshape_us:
Wild Shape uses per day, by character level:

Levels 1–3: 2
Levels 4–7: 3
Levels 8–11: 4
Levels 12–15: 5
Levels 16–19: 6
Level 20: Infinite uses.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.wildshape_sp: Starting at level 18, you can cast spells while in beast form.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.four_element: The Ki cost of each discipline depends on its strength and spell level.

At level 10, you can select a second discipline.

At level 20, replace both of your original disciplines with new, higher level selections.

• Your first discipline uses the %s key. 

• Your second discipline uses the %s key.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.combat_wild_:
Circle of the Moon: extra forms by level

Level 4: Grizzly Bear, Tiger
Level 6: Crocodile, Bison, Rhinoceros
Level 8: Moose, Elephant, Orca
Level 10: Fire Elemental, Frost Elemental
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.swords_stanc: Press %s to cycle between Slashing, Defensive, and Mobile stance.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.swords_slash:
Slashing stance: 
 Strike with an extra melee attack on the flourish, applying any on-hit effects but reduced damage.

Levels 1–4: 25% attack strength
Levels 5–9: 50% attack strength
Levels 10–14: 75% attack strength
Level 15+: 100% attack strength
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.swords_mobil:
Mobile stance:
 Your fluorish knocks the target away from you. If you are airborne, push yourself backward as well. The pushback force scales with your level.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.swords_defen:
Defensive stance
 Your fluorish primes you against the next damage you would take, reducing the damage of a single hit. 

Levels 1–4: 20% reduced damage
Levels 5–9: 25% reduced damage
Levels 10–14: 30% reduced damage
Level 15+: 35% reduced damage
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.swords_capst: At level 20, triggering a flourish increases your attack speed by 5% for 5 seconds, stacking indefinitely.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.bard_lore_cu:
Levels 0–4: 
• During Inspiration, nearby enemies deal 10% reduced damage from all sources.

Levels 5–9: 
• During Inspiration, nearby enemies deal 15% reduced damage from all sources.

Levels 10–14: 
• During Inspiration, nearby enemies deal 20% reduced damage from all sources.

Level 15+: 
• During Inspiration, nearby enemies deal 25% reduced damage from all sources.

Level 20: 
• Enemies always deal 10% reduced damage from all sources. Inspiration effect unchanged.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.bard_valor_b:
Levels 0–4: 
• During Inspiration, nearby allies deal 10% increased damage from all sources and regenerate health.

Levels 5–9: 
• During Inspiration, nearby allies deal 15% increased damage from all sources and regenerate health.

Levels 10–14: 
• During Inspiration, nearby allies deal 20% increased damage from all sources and regenerate health.

Level 15+: 
• During Inspiration, nearby allies deal 25% increased damage from all sources and regenerate health.

Level 20: 
• The effects of your Battle Hymn persist for 5 minutes.
tooltip.otherworldorigins.hover_cost: Spend %s levels to reset all stats.
tooltip.otherworldorigins.hover_refund: %s%% of XP spent on stats will be refunded.
passive.otherworldorigins.magic_mana.des: Increases the amount of mana available for casting.
passive.otherworldorigins.int_spell_powe: Increase the potency of all spells you cast.
passive.otherworldorigins.int_cooldown_r: Reduces the time between spell casts.
passive.otherworldorigins.health_per_lev: Gain an additional 1/2 heart per Character Level.
otherworldorigins.tooltip.advanced_table: Requires the Legendary Smith Skill and an Underdark subrace
otherworldorigins.tooltip.basic_table_re: Requires an Underdark subrace, or the Legendary Smith skill
skill.otherworldorigins.reforging.descri: Gain knowledge of Gem Cutting and Epic-Mythic Reforging.  Underdark races who learn this skill can understand Augmenting and Ancient Reforging.
skill.otherworldorigins.wisdom.descripti: All spells you cast will be 1 level higher.
skill.otherworldorigins.diamond_skin.des: Gain %1$s resistance to all damage, increased to %3$s while sneaking.
otherworldorigins.uncastable: You can't use this ability right now.
otherworldorigins.reforge_restricted: Your lack the knowledge needed to use this table...
otherworld.message.charisma_save: You were seen committing a crime, but spared punishment thanks to your Charisma.
effect.otherworldorigins.golem_timer.des: Displays the duration remaining on your summons, and their count
effect.otherworldorigins.favored_foe.des: Marked as a ranger's quarry. Takes increased damage and is outlined.
effect.otherworldorigins.cutting_words.d: Your damage dealt is reduced by the bard's discordant wit.
effect.otherworldorigins.battle_hymn.des: Inspired valor: you deal increased damage from all sources and slowly recover health.
effect.otherworldorigins.flourish_moment: Each blade flourish drives you faster; attack speed rises with every stack.
Briefly marks a target struck by a high-speed dive; you glow and cannot be hit again by the same dive pulse until it wears off.
effect.otherworldorigins.beast_timer.des: Displays the duration remaining on your summons, and their count
origin.origins.human.description:
-§l Notable Changes§r: 
§oNone§r

 A human's fate is more open than most - venture forth with no benefits or drawbacks.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/human.name: Human
origin.otherworldorigins.race/human.desc:
• Medium Size 
• +1 to All Stats§r
• 10% Discount from Villagers§r

§oVersatile and adaptable, perfectly prepared for the full spectrum of challenges one may face on an adventure.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/human_vari:
• Medium Size 
• +2 to Two Stats of your choice
• +1 bonus Feat of your choice
(All races can choose a Feat every 4 levels)§r

§oThere is great power in sacrifice. What you leave behind unearths who you could be.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/elf.name: Elf
origin.otherworldorigins.race/elf.descri:
• Medium Size§r
• +2 Dexterity§r
• Darkvision§r

§oElves are graceful and agile, with keen senses and a natural affinity for magic.§r

§nSubraces§r
• High Elf
• Wood Elf
• Drow
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/elf/hig:
• +1 Intelligence§r
• +1 Cantrip from the Wizard spell list§r

§oHigh elves are wise and powerful. They are known for their intellect and magical aptitude.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/elf/woo:
• +1 Dexterity
• +1 Speed§r

§oWood elves are swift and perceptive, at home in the forests and wild lands.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/elf/dro:
• +1 Intelligence§r
• Improved Reforging§r

§oDrow, or dark elves, are known for their cunning and mastery of ancient magics.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/half_elf.d:
• Medium Size§r
• +2 Charisma§r
• +1 to Two Stats
• Darkvision§r

§oThe fabled power of Elven blood and the courageous soul of Humans. High-Elves are often natural-born diplomats.§r

§nSubraces§r
• High Half-Elf
• Wood Half-Elf
• Drow Half-Elf
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/half_el:
• +1 Intelligence§r
• +1 Cantrip from the Wizard spell list§r

§oYour High-Elven ancestors were wise and powerful. You inherited some of their intellect and magical aptitude.

• +1 Dexterity
• +10% Speed§r

§oLike your Wood-Elven elders you are swift and perceptive, at home in the forests and wild lands.

• +1 Intelligence§r
• Improved Reforging§r

§oYour Drow lineage has imbued your memories with some of their esoteric knowledge.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/dwarf.name: Dwarf
origin.otherworldorigins.race/dwarf.desc:
• Small Size
• +2 Constitution
• -10% Speed
• Darkvision
• Dwarven Resilience

§oA tough and stocky race, often accompanied by the clamoring of pickaxes. §r

§nSubraces§r
• Hill Dwarf
• Mountain Dwarf
• Duergar
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/dwarf/h:
• +1 Building
• +1 Heart per Level

§oHill dwarves are the most adventurous of the dwarven races - they often live above ground, and are well adapted to settling new lands.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/dwarf/m:
• +1 Strength§r
• +1 Defence§r

§oMountain dwarves are resilient and sturdy, conditioned by the rugged unforgiving snowy peaks they call home.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/dwarf/d:
• +1 Intelligence§r
• Improved Reforging§r

§oDuergar, or gray dwarves, hail from deep in the underdark - a Duergar rarely ever sees the light of day.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/halfling.d:
• Small Size
• +2 Dexterity§r
• +1 Luck
• -10% Speed

§oHalflings are nimble and lucky, with a natural talent for stealth and precision.§r

§nSubraces§r
Lightfoot Halfling
Stout Halfling
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/halflin:
• +1 Charisma§r
• +10% Speed§r

§oThey'll never know what hit them.

• +1 Constitution§r
• Poison Resistance§r

§oYou've had several lifetimes worth of stew for someone your size. This has proven to be a great asset.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/gnome.name: Gnome
origin.otherworldorigins.race/gnome.desc:
• Small Size
• +2 Intelligence
• +1 Luck
• -10% Speed
• Darkvision

§oSharp minds and wit, and hearts full of wonder. Can't reach the top shelf.§r

§nSubraces§r
Rock Gnome
Forest Gnome
Deep Gnome
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/gnome/r:
• +1 Constitution§r

§oWhere others see junk, rock gnomes see possibility. Their workshops hum with the promise of the next great invention—or spectacular explosion.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/gnome/f:
• +1 Dexterity§r

§oMasters of misdirection, forest gnomes dance through dappled shadows, their laughter echoing like wind chimes in a summer breeze.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/gnome/d:
• Improved Reforging§r

§oSilent as stone, deep gnomes carry the weight of the earth in their eyes. Their craftsmanship whispers secrets of ages long past.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/dragonborn:
• Medium Size§r
• +2 Strength
• +1 Charisma
• Draconic Ancestry
• 10% Physical Resistance

§oScaled and proud, dragonborn walk the line between mortal and myth. Their mere presence commands respect.§r

§nSubraces§r
Black, Blue, Brass, Bronze, Copper, Gold, Green, Red, Silver, White
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/dragonb:
• Acid Breath Attack§r

§oTheir words drip with sarcasm as corrosive as their breath. Swamp-dwellers beware: these dragons in mortal form feel right at home in your turf.

• Lightning Breath Attack§r

§oWith personalities as electric as their breath, blue dragonborn crackle with barely contained energy. They're shockingly good company.

• Fire Breath Attack§r

§oNever at a loss for words, brass dragonborn could talk the scales off a dragon. Their fiery breath is often preceded by equally heated debates.

• Lightning Breath Attack§r

§oNoble as their metallic namesake, bronze dragonborn stand tall against injustice. Their lightning breath is matched only by their quick wit in battle.

• Acid Breath Attack§r

§oWith a joke always on the tip of their forked tongue, copper dragonborn prove that laughter truly is the best medicine—unless you're on the receiving end of their acidic humor.

• Fire Breath Attack§r

§oRadiant in both appearance and spirit, gold dragonborn shine with inner light. Their fire breath is but a glimpse of the sun's fury given form.

• Fire Breath Attack§r

§oPassionate and fierce, red dragonborn burn with the intensity of a thousand forges. Their tempers flare as readily as their devastating breath weapon.

• Cold Breath Attack§r

§oRegal and serene, silver dragonborn move with fluid grace. Their icy breath brings winter's bite, even on the warmest summer day.

• Cold Breath Attack§r

§oHardy as the frozen tundra, white dragonborn thrive where others shiver. Their frosty demeanor hides hearts as vast and deep as glaciers.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/tiefling.d:
• Medium Size§r
• +2 Charisma§r
• +1 Intelligence§r
• Darkvision§r
• Hellish Resistance§r
• Infernal Legacy§r

§oA hint of brimstone in their wake and mischief in their eyes; Tieflings are devilishly clever.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/undead.des:
§oNeither alive nor dead, cursed to walk this world until their creator's purpose is served.§r

§nSubraces§r
Zombie
Skeleton
Wither Skeleton
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/undead/:
• Medium Size
• +1 Defense
• +Poison Resistance
• -Sun Resistance

§oSlow and steady wins the race (especially when you've got eternity to finish). Mind the sun; it's bad for your skin.

• Medium Size§r
• +1 Dexterity
• +5 Bow Damage
• -Bow Resistance

§oThe reanimated scaffolding of a humanoid, designed for only one purpose - shoot arrow.

• Tall Size§r
• +1 Strength§r
• +5 Sword Damage§r
• -Sword Resistance§r

§oBorn in the fires of the Nether, these ashen warriors emanate death wherever they walk.
origin.otherworldorigins.race/other.name: Other
origin.otherworldorigins.race/other.desc:
§oRare and unusual races; less common choices for player characters.§r

§nSubraces§r
Githyanki
Hobgoblin
Goblin
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/other/g:
• Tall Size
• Water Vulnerable
• Teleport with Ender Pearls§r
• +1 Defence§r

§oThe Githyanki are tall, slender aliens who hail from the stars; manipulating space and time comes easily to them, but they are not adapted to our world.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/other/h:
• Medium Size§r
• Gold Proficiency (Increased Gold Stats)§r
• Heat Resistance§r
• +1 Strength§r

§oWarriors by nature, with an innate hot temper, though more conscientious and resilient than their goblin relatives.
origin.otherworldorigins.subrace/other/g:
• Medium Size§r
• Gold Proficiency (Increased Gold Stats)§r
• Cold Resistance§r
• +1 Dexterity§r

§oSmall, green, and perpetually underestimated, goblins use their miniature form to great advantage. Keep an eye on your coin purse.
power.otherworldorigins.dark_vision.name: Dark Vision
power.otherworldorigins.race/half_elf/ch: §oCharisma reduces the chance you will be punished when committing a crime.
power.otherworldorigins.race/tiefling/ch: §oCharisma reduces the chance you will be punished when committing a crime.
power.otherworldorigins.subrace/halfling: §oCharisma reduces the chance you will be punished when committing a crime.
power.otherworldorigins.race/dragonborn/: §oCharisma reduces the chance you will be punished when committing a crime.
power.otherworldorigins.race/tiefling/in: §oYou can instantly cast Firebolt for 10 mana. Once you reach level 7, this ability upgrades to Fireball. At level 14, instead cast Magma Bomb for 20 mana.
power.otherworldorigins.race/dragonborn/: §oYour dragon scales grant you 10% resistance to physical weapons. You can breathe a cone of magical energy based on your ancestral heritage
power.otherworldorigins.race/undead/unde: §oAll Undead races receive inverted Healing and Harming effects, and take extra damage from the Smite enchantment. They have no hunger or thirst, and do not have to breathe air.
power.otherworldorigins.subrace/undead/z: §oYou'll burn in daylight - this can be negated with a helmet.
power.otherworldorigins.subrace/other/go: §oYou receive 50% extra stats from gold gear, and gold gear has 50% more durability
power.otherworldorigins.subrace/other/ho: §oYou receive 50% extra stats from gold gear, and gold gear has 50% more durability
power.otherworldorigins.subrace/other/gi: §oYou can summon and throw an ender pearl to teleport. Once you reach level 11, you can directly teleport up to 50 blocks in the direction you are facing (with no line-of-sight required), without taking fall damage until you land.
§oYou take damage from water and rain, but this can be offset with the Water Protection enchantment.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/chef.name: Chef
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/chef.desc: Your Hunger and Thirst drain 25% slower.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/defensive: When wielding a one-handed weapon, you have a 10% chance to dodge incoming attacks
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/dual_wiel: Gain 10% Attack Damage while holding a weapon in both hands
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/everybody: Receive an extra 10% discount from Villagers
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/savage_at: Deal 2 extra damage with melee attacks
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/two_hande: Gain 10% Attack Damage while holding a two-handed weapon
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/elemental: You are immune to Temperature effects
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/lucky.des: Once per day, reroll your Enchanting seed for free.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/martial_a: Your Attack Speed is increased by 10%
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/mobile.de: Your Movement Speed is increased by 10%
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/polearm_m: Your melee attacks with Staffs apply a knockback effect
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/resilient: You can select +1 to any Stat
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/sharpshoo: Your arrows shoot 10% faster and farther
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/shield_ma: While holding a shield in your off-hand, gain 10% resistance to all damage sources
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/skilled.d: Your Jump Height is increased to 2 blocks.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/weapon_ma: Deal 10% extra damage with any weapon, ranged or melee
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_fi: You become attuned to all Fire spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_ic: You become attuned to all Ice spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_li: You become attuned to all Lightning spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_ho: You become attuned to all Holy spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_en: You become attuned to all Ender spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_bl: You become attuned to all Blood spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_ev: You become attuned to all Evocation spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_na: You become attuned to all Nature spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_el: You become attuned to all Eldritch spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_aq: You become attuned to all Aqua spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_so: You become attuned to all Sound spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.feats/school_ge: You become attuned to all Geomancy spells.
origin.otherworldorigins.class/artificer:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• Repairing gear does not increase its enchantment cost. 
• At level 20, gain Soul of Artifice

§nSubclasses§r
Alchemist
Armourer
Artillerist
Battle Smith
origin.otherworldorigins.class/barbarian:
• 12 Hearts + 5/Level
• Rage 

§nSubclasses§r
Wildheart
Berserker
Wild Magic
origin.otherworldorigins.class/bard.desc:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• +1 Cantrip from the Bard spell list
• Inspiration

§nSubclasses§r
College of Lore
College of Valor
College of Swords
origin.otherworldorigins.class/cleric.de:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• +1 Cantrip from the Cleric spell list
• Starting at level 10, you can call for Divine Intervention from a deity of your Domain, once per day.

§nSubclasses§r
Life Domain
Trickery Domain
Knowledge Domain
Tempest Domain
War Domain
origin.otherworldorigins.class/druid.des:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• Wild Shape
• +1 Cantrip from the Druid spell list
origin.otherworldorigins.class/fighter.d:
• 10 Hearts + 4/Level
• Second Wind

§nSubclasses§r
Battle Master
Eldritch Knight
Champion
origin.otherworldorigins.class/monk.desc:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• Ki
• Step of the Wind
• Deflect Missiles

§nSubclasses§r
Way of the Four Elements
Way of the Open Hand
Way of Shadow
origin.otherworldorigins.class/paladin.d:
• 10 Hearts + 4/Level
• Lay on Hands

§nSubclasses§r
Oath of the Ancients
Oath of Devotion
Oath of Vengeance
Oath Breaker
origin.otherworldorigins.class/ranger.de:
• 10 Hearts + 4/Level
• Land's Stride
• Goodberry
• Favored Foe

§nSubclasses§r
Beast Master
Gloom Stalker
Hunter
origin.otherworldorigins.class/rogue.des:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• +2 Ranged Damage
• Sneak Attack
• Uncanny Dodge

§nSubclasses§r
Thief
Arcane Trickster
Assassin
• 6 Hearts + 2/Level
• +1 Magic
• +20% Magic Damage
• +1 Cantrip from the Sorcerer spell list

§nSubclasses§r
Wild Magic
Draconic Bloodline
origin.otherworldorigins.class/warlock.d:
• 8 Hearts + 3/Level
• +1 Magic
• Eldritch Blast
• +1 Cantrip from the Warlock spell list

§nSubclasses§r
The Fiend
The Great Old One
origin.otherworldorigins.class/wizard.de:
• 6 Hearts + 2/Level
• +20% Magic Damage
• +1 Magic
• +1 Cantrip from the Wizard spell list

§nSubclasses§r
Abjuration
Evocation
Necromancy
Conjuration
Enchanting
Transmutation
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/artifi:
• Beneficial effects you receive last 50% longer
• Experimental Elixir
• At level 15, choose a Chemical Mastery, enhancing your experimental elixir.

• +1 Armor
• Armor you repair gains an additional 10% / 15% / 20% armor at levels 5, 10, and 15.

• +1 Ranged Damage
• Bows and Crossbows you repair gain an additional 10% / 15% / 20% arrow damage at levels 5, 10, and 15.

• +1 Melee Damage
• Weapons you repair gain an additional 10% / 15% / 20% attack damage at levels 5, 10, and 15.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/barbar: • Summon a Beast for 50 mana, lasting 10 minutes. This gets stronger as you level up.

• +3 Melee Damage

• At levels 5, 10, and 15, deal +3 / +6 / +9 damage per hit while raging.

• At level 20, on death, heal to full health and enter an enhanced rage with increased speed and damage for the duration (Once per day).

While raging, every few melee attacks bursts out in a wild surge of magic, casting a random spell from the Surge pool at the target. 

The frequency, and the rarity of the spell, increases with your level.
origin.otherworldorigins.class/bard.name: Bard
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/bard/l:
• At level 5, select an additional Cantrip from the global spell list.
• Cutting Words
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/bard/s:
• Your attacks deal an additional +1-4 magic damage on hit, based on level.
• Blade Flourish
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/cleric:
• +50% Healing Effectiveness
• At level 5, gain Divine Strike
• At level 10, you can call for Divine Intervention from Apollo, once per day, with a chance equal to twice your Luck stat to succeed. At level 20, your call will always be answered.

• +25% Evocation Spell Power
• At level 5, gain Divine Strike
• At level 10, you can call for Divine Intervention from Hades, once per day, with a chance equal to twice your Luck stat to succeed. At level 20, your call will always be answered.

• You can see all enchantments when enchanting items
• -20% Enchantment Cost
• At level 10, you can call for Divine Intervention from Athena, once per day, with a chance equal to twice your Luck stat to succeed. At level 20, your call will always be answered.

• +30% Lightning/Thunder Damage
• At level 5, gain Divine Strike
• At level 10, you can call for Divine Intervention from Zeus, once per day, with a chance equal to twice your Luck stat to succeed. At level 20, your call will always be answered.

• +2 Attack Damage
• At level 5, gain Divine Strike
• At level 10, you can call for Divine Intervention from Ares, once per day, with a chance equal to twice your Luck stat to succeed. At level 20, your call will always be answered.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/druid/:
• Deal 10% increased damage to rooted enemies. At levels 10 and 20, this increases to 20% and 30%.
• Land's Stride
• At level 10, gain Nature's Ward

• Combat Wild Shape
• Summon a Beast for 50 mana, lasting 10 minutes. 5 minute cooldown.
• At level 5, gain Primal Strikes.

• Bonus Stats while below y=0
• Summon 2 Undead for 50 mana, lasting 10 minutes. 5 minute cooldown.
• At level 10, gain Fungal Body.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/fighte:
• +3 Attack Damage
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain +20% / +40% / +60% extra damage on critical attacks
• At level 20, Second Wind heals for twice as much and comes back up four times more quickly.

• +1 Attack Damage
• +10% Spell Power
• +1 Cantrip from the Eldritch Knight spell list
• At level 10, gain War Magic.
• At level 20, gain Arcane Tempo.
origin.otherworldorigins.class/monk.name: Monk
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/monk/f: • You master an Elemental Discipline. Starting at level 10, you master two Elemental Disciplines.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/ranger:
• Summon a Beast for 50 mana, lasting 10 minutes.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, your beast grows stronger

• At level 20, the beast transforms.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/rogue/:
• 20% Reduced Fall Damage
• Quiet Footsteps
• Your Sneak Attack can also trigger by being invisible
• At level 10, gain Supreme Sneak.

• +10% Magic Damage
• +1 Cantrip from the Arcane Trickster spell list
• At level 10, deal 10% additional magic damage to targets looking away from you.
• At level 20, gain Spell Thief.

• +2 Attack Damage
• Sneak Attack deals +20% extra damage. Increases to +40% / +60% / +80% damage at level / 5 / 10 / 15
• At level 20, gain Death Strike.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/rogue/a: Your attacks have a chance equal to your Dexterity to deal double damage.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/sorcer:
• Your spell casts can burst out in a surge of wild magic, with a chance equal to your Luck to cast a random spell from the Surge pool. The spell rarity increases based on your character level.
• At level 20, gain Controlled Chaos.

• +5 Armor
• +1 Heart per Level
• You have enhanced spells of one school based on your draconic ancestry.
origin.otherworldorigins.draconic_ancest: • At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Nature spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Lightning spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Fire spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Lightning spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Nature spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Fire spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Fire spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Ice spell power.
• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain 5%, 10%, and 15% additional Ice spell power.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/warloc: • Whenever you slay an entity, gain absorption hearts equal to your character level. Does not stack with other sources of absorption hearts.
• You have innate knowledge of all Eldritch magic; you can understand Eldritch spells without having to read Eldritch Manuscripts.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/wizard:
• Summon 4 Undead for 50 mana, lasting 10 minutes.

• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain +5% / +10% / +15% summon damage.

• Summon a Mythic Golem for 50 mana, lasting 10 minutes. Only 1 Golem may be active at a time.

• At levels 5, 10, and 15, gain +5% / +10% / +15% summon damage.

• -10% Enchantment Cost, with an additional 5%, 10%, and 15% reduction at levels 5, 10, and 15.
• At level 20, gain Enchantment Savant
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/wizard/: Enchantments you roll at an enchanting table are 1 level higher.
origin.otherworldorigins.subclass/wizard: • Double the duration of potion effects
power.otherworldorigins.class/warlock/el: Instantly cast Magic Missile (Level 5) for 10 Mana. Once you reach level 15, cast 3 missiles in sequence for no extra cost.
power.otherworldorigins.class/fighter/se: Heal yourself for 4 Hearts + 1/Level, at the cost of hunger. 1 minute cooldown.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/fighter: When you deal spell damage to a living creature, strike them with a projection of your held weapon, simulating an attack. 2 second cooldown.
When you strike an enemy with a melee attack, reduce all of your pending spell cooldowns by half a second.
power.otherworldorigins.class/barbarian/: Enter a furious state to empower yourself in combat. While enraged, deal bonus damage and take reduced damage based on your level. Hitting enemies extends the duration. After the effect ends, you must wait before raging again. Charges replenish on sleep.
power.otherworldorigins.class/paladin/la: You have a healing pool equal to your level × 5 hearts. Aim at a living target within 4 blocks to heal them, or heal yourself if no target is hit, drawing from your remaining pool. Refill your pool by sleeping.
power.otherworldorigins.class/bard/inspi: While playing an instrument, your music inspires those around you. Friendlies within 32 blocks restore 1 health per second.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/bard/sw:
On your final attack in a weapon combo you perform a stylish flourish based on your current stance. 
Read the badges for more information.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/bard/va: Your performances further empowers your allies, further increasing their damage and regeneration from your Inspiration.
power.otherworldorigins.class/monk/ki.de: You can harness the mystic energy of Ki to perform various feats. Your Ki reserves grow with level, and restore when you sleep.
Dash forward for 1 Ki and enhance your next jump, granting extra height.
power.otherworldorigins.class/monk/defle: You have a percent chance equal to your Dexterity to dodge incoming projectiles.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/monk/fo: Harness the power of the four elements, allowing you to cast a spell for your Ki instead of using mana. Read the badges for more info.
power.otherworldorigins.class/rogue/snea: Deal bonus damage on your first hit against an enemy, scaling with your level. Sneak Attack deals extra damage if you are sneaking and the target is facing away from you.
power.otherworldorigins.class/rogue/unca: Take half damage from your next attack, with a chance equal to twice your dexterity to take no damage at all. You must wait 1 minute to use this ability after dodging.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/rogue/a: • Activate to steal a spell on your next attack. If the target is channeling, steal that spell and cast it at the target immediately, cancelling their cast. If they are not channeling, steal their most recent spell instead, place it on cooldown, and drain 50 mana. You can do this once per day.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/rogue/t:
• When you sneak in dark areas, you gain true invisibility with a small distance limit but no time limit. Damaging an enemy prevents this for 5 seconds.

• At Level 20, you can do this even in full daylight.
power.otherworldorigins.class/ranger/fav: Damaging an enemy marks them for 5 seconds, increasing all damage they take by a percent equal to your Character Level.
power.otherworldorigins.class/ranger/goo: Conjure up to 10 magic berries (based on level) that each restore 4 hearts when eaten. Berries lose their magic after one day and no longer heal. Recharges on sleep.
power.otherworldorigins.class/artificer/: Starting at level 20, hold rare loot and activate to add an extra affix for the item's rarity. You can do this once per day. Reforging clears the infusion.
otherworldorigins.soul_of_artifice.canno: You can't infuse this item with your Artificer's Soul.
otherworldorigins.experimental_elixir.ca: You need an empty bottle, water bottle, or awkward potion to brew an experimental elixir.
origin.otherworldorigins.chemical_master: Your experimental elixirs stay beneficial and become lingering potions. Beneficial potion effects you receive last an additional 50% longer.
Your experimental elixirs become harmful lingering clouds. Harmful potion and debuff durations on you are shortened by 75%.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/artific: Once per day, you can magically produce an experimental elixir in an empty bottle, water bottle, or awkward potion. This improves as you level up, as listed in the tooltips.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/cleric/: Once every 5 seconds, infuse your next attack with divine energy of the Tempest, smiting the target with a lightning bolt whose power is based on your level.
Once every 5 seconds, infuse your next attack with divine energy of War, piercing the target with blood needles whose power is based on your level.
Once every 5 seconds, infuse your next attack with divine energy of Life, smiting the target with a sunbeam whose power is based on your level.
Once every 5 seconds, infuse your next attack with divine energy of Trickery, striking the target with Firecracker whose power is based on your level.
Cast high level variants of Shockwave, Ascension, and Thunderstorm in sequence, then a number of Lightning Lances thrown at nearby enemies, repeating targets if few are nearby.
Unleash three Stomps and Earthquake in sequence, then a number of Blood Slashes aimed at nearby enemies, repeating targets if few are nearby.
Restore all mana and reset spell cooldowns for you and all nearby allies, and grant everyone the Ancient Knowledge IV effect for 30 seconds, greatly increasing experience gain.

Fully heal and cleanse harmful effects from you and all nearby allies, then cast a powerful Fortification spell affecting allies directly around you. After a moment, bring down three powerful Sunbeams at nearby enemies, repeating targets if few are nearby.

Grant nearby friendlies True Invisibility for 30 seconds, then throw a chaotic frenzy of Fireworks and Creeper Heads at nearby enemies, repeating targets if few are nearby. When the volley is finished, turn yourself invisible.
otherworldorigins.divine_intervention.fa: Your prayers were not answered. Your faith is tested.
otherworldorigins.divine_intervention.su: Your prayers were answered. %s answers your call.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.experimental:
Level 5+: 
• 2 uses per day. 
• Gain a chance for an additional effect, and a chance for a higher amplifier.

Level 10+: 
• 3 daily uses. 
• All elixirs have at least 2 effects with a chance for a third. 
• All new elixirs will be longer.

Level 15+: 
• 4 daily uses. 
• At least 2 effects, with a chance for up to 4 effects per elixir, plus the bonuses from your Chemical Mastery alignment.
power.otherworldorigins.class/ranger/lan: You are resistant to the Slowness effect and are not slowed by dense foliage or the Root spell.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.wildheart_su:
Levels 1-4: 
• Summon a Grizzly Bear at level 1.

Level 5+: 
• Summon a Grizzly Bear at level 3.

Level 10+: 
• Summon a Grizzly Bear at level 5.

Level 15+: 
• Summon a Grizzly Bear at level 7.

Level 20: 
• Instead summon a Forsaken, at level 3.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.wild_magic_s:
Levels 1-4: 
• Every 6th attack while raging. 
• Spell range: common rarity only.

Levels 5-9: 
• Every 5th attack while raging. 
• Spell range: uncommon to rare.

Levels 10-14: 
• Every 4th attack while raging. 
• Spell rarity range: uncommon to epic.

Level 15+: 
• Every 3rd attack while raging. 
• Spell rarity range: rare to legendary.

Levels 1-4: 
• Spell range: common rarity only.

Levels 5-9: 
• Spell range: uncommon to rare.

Levels 10-14: 
• Spell range: uncommon to epic.

Level 15+: 
• Spell range: rare to legendary.

Controlled Chaos (Lv. 20): 
• In addition to your random casts, every spellcast has a flat 10% chance to instantly cast the same spell again.
• This does not apply to spells with Recasts or continuously channneled spells.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/bard/lo: Your biting tongue affects enemies within 32 blocks during your Inspiration performance, reducing their damage dealt from all sources.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/druid/l: Your attunement with nature empowers you; you no longer experience and hunger or thirst, and all poison damage you would take heals you instead.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/druid/f: The fungal spores throughout your body alter you; you gain total immunity to all negative potion effects.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/druid/p: Your attacks deal +1 to +4 bonus magic damage on hit at levels 5, 10, 15, and 20.
power.otherworldorigins.subclass/druid/c: Starting at level 5, your attacks in wildshape deal additional magic damage. The rites of your circle grant you the ability to transform into more dangerous forms. Read the badge for details.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.necromancy_b:
Levels 1-4: 
• Cast Raise Dead at level 3 (4 undead). 
• 50 mana, 10 minute duration.

Level 20: 
• Instead cast Cursed Revenants at level 5.
otherworldorigins.gui.badge.conjuration_:
Levels 1-4: 
• Summon Mythic Golem at level  3. 
• 50 mana, 10 minute duration. Only 1 golem at a time.

Level 20: 
• Instead cast Eternal Sentinel at level 4.

power.otherworldorigins.class/druid/wild: You can magically assume the shape of a beast. Additional forms are unlocked on levels 4, 6, and 8. The number of transformations per day increases with level.
